model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time ~ daca_eligible + age + I(age ** 2) + sex_female + C(statefip) + C(year) + driverslicenses + instatetuition + statefinancialaid + higheredban + C(everify) + limiteverify + omnibus + C(jail287g) + lfpr + unemp", data=sample, weights=sample["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": sample["statefip"]})
